mapper.select: SELECT s.store_seq AS storeSeq, s.user_seq AS userSeq, s.biz_number AS bizNumber, s.company_name AS companyName, s.ceo_name AS ceoName, s.opening_date AS openingDate, s.zonecode, s.address1, s.address2 FROM stores s JOIN users u ON s.user_seq = u.user_seq WHERE u.user_type = 'PARTNER' AND (s.company_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchTerm}, '%') OR s.biz_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchTerm}, '%')) AND u.status = 'ACTIVE'

SELECT s.store_seq AS storeSeq, s.user_seq AS userSeq, s.biz_number AS bizNumber, s.company_name AS companyName, s.ceo_name AS ceoName, s.opening_date AS openingDate, s.zonecode, s.address1, s.address2 FROM stores s JOIN users u ON s.user_seq = u.user_seq WHERE u.user_type = 'PARTNER' AND u.status = 'ACTIVE'
AND s.address1 LIKE CONCAT(#{city}, '%')
AND s.address1 LIKE CONCAT('%', #{district}, '%')
AND (s.company_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchTerm}, '%') OR s.ceo_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchTerm}, '%') OR s.biz_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchTerm}, '%'))
ORDER BY s.company_name ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO partner_relations ( business_seq, partner_seq, memo, created_at ) VALUES ( #{businessSeq}, #{partnerSeq}, #{memo}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select:
SELECT pr.relation_seq AS relationSeq, pr.business_seq AS businessSeq, pr.partner_seq AS partnerSeq, pr.memo, pr.created_at AS createdAt, s.company_name AS companyName, s.biz_number AS bizNumber, s.ceo_name AS ceoName, s.address1, s.address2 FROM partner_relations pr JOIN stores s ON pr.partner_seq = s.store_seq WHERE pr.business_seq = #{businessSeq}
AND s.address1 LIKE CONCAT(#{city}, '%')
AND s.address1 LIKE CONCAT('%', #{district}, '%')
AND (s.company_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchTerm}, '%') OR s.ceo_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchTerm}, '%') OR s.biz_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchTerm}, '%'))
ORDER BY pr.created_at DESC

SELECT i.item_seq AS itemSeq, i.category_seq AS categorySeq, c.category_name AS categoryName, i.item_code AS itemCode, i.item_name AS itemName, i.spec, i.unit_price AS unitPrice, i.item_image AS itemImage FROM items i JOIN categories c ON i.category_seq = c.category_seq JOIN stores s ON i.user_seq = s.user_seq WHERE s.store_seq = #{partnerSeq} ORDER BY i.item_name ASC
SELECT store_seq FROM stores WHERE user_seq = #{userSeq} ORDER BY store_seq ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT s.store_seq AS storeSeq, s.user_seq AS userSeq, s.biz_number AS bizNumber, s.company_name AS companyName, s.ceo_name AS ceoName, s.opening_date AS openingDate, s.zonecode, s.address1, s.address2, u.phone AS phone, u.email AS email FROM stores s JOIN users u ON s.user_seq = u.user_seq WHERE s.store_seq = #{partnerSeq}
